name: Aoife M.
quote: The space is unlike any other recovery studio I've been to — calm, considered, and the staff actually know what they're talking about. HBOT has become the one hour of my week I protect.

name: Conor D.
quote: I started PEMF as a pre-sleep reset and now I'm in once a week without fail. I sleep better on the nights I go. Easily the best part of my routine.

name: Niamh O.
quote: Premium without the hype. I booked a free consultation, left with a plan that actually fit my schedule, and I've been back every week since.

name: Seán K.
quote: I use Red Light after rugby training. I can't promise it's magic, but I'm less sore on Mondays than I used to be — and the sessions are quick enough that it's never a hassle.
